presets.description: Interior precast composite box beam using drawing variables B, H, h1, h3, h4, h5, h6, h7, h8, b2, b3, and b4. h1 is the top cover above the inner void.

parameters.name: h3_mm
parameters.label: h3 — Bottom cover to inner flat (mm)

parameters.name: h6_mm
parameters.label: h6 — Top to left outer break (mm)

parameters.name: h7_mm
parameters.label: h7 — Bottom to left outer break (mm)

parameters.name: h8_mm
parameters.label: h8 — Vertical rise from point 1 to point 2 (mm)

parameters.name: b4_mm
parameters.label: b4 — Horizontal run from point 1 to point 2 (mm)

presets.description: Exterior precast composite box beam using drawing variables B, H, h1, h3, h4, h5, h6, h7, h8, b2, b3, and b4. The right outer face is straight; default b3 is 360 mm and the right end of b3 sits b2 + 180 mm from the rightmost outer edge.

parameters.name: B1_mm
parameters.label: B1 Top flange width (mm)
parameters.description: Top flange overall width.

parameters.name: B2_mm
parameters.label: B2 Bottom flange width (mm)
parameters.description: Bottom flange overall width.

parameters.name: D1_mm
parameters.label: D1 Overall depth (mm)
parameters.description: Total girder section depth.

parameters.name: D2_mm
parameters.label: D2 Top flange thickness (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical thickness of the top flange zone.

parameters.name: D3_mm
parameters.label: D3 Top haunch / taper depth (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical depth of the transition from top flange width to upper web width.

parameters.name: D5_mm
parameters.label: D5 Bottom flange thickness (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical thickness of the bottom flange zone.

parameters.name: D6_mm
parameters.label: D6 Bottom haunch / taper depth (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical depth of the transition from lower web width to bottom flange width.

parameters.name: T1_mm
parameters.label: T1 Upper web width (mm)
parameters.description: Web width at the bottom of the top haunch.

parameters.name: T2_mm
parameters.label: T2 Lower / main web width (mm)
parameters.description: Web width at the top of the bottom haunch.

parameters.name: C1_mm
parameters.label: C1 Corner chamfer (mm)
parameters.description: Optional outside corner chamfer. Use 0 for square corners.

parameters.description: Top side offset shown in the plank detail.

parameters.name: b2_mm
parameters.label: b2 Lower side offset (mm)
parameters.description: Lower side offset. Interior: B ≈ b3 + 2b2. Exterior: B ≈ b3 + b2.

parameters.description: Bottom/lower reference width of the precast plank.

parameters.description: Composite deck/topping thickness metadata. Not merged into precast polygon in this milestone.

parameters.description: Manual effective width for current milestone. AASHTO auto calculation is planned.

parameters.label: Overhang width for AASHTO Be (mm)

parameters.name: width_mm
parameters.label: B Overall slab width (mm)
parameters.description: Total slab bridge width from outside edge to outside edge. Default follows the provided drawing: 5100 mm.

parameters.name: edge_depth_mm
parameters.label: He Edge depth (mm)
parameters.description: Slab depth at both outside edges. Default follows the provided drawing: 400 mm.

parameters.name: center_depth_mm
parameters.label: Hc Centerline depth (mm)
parameters.description: Slab depth at the bridge centerline/crown. Default follows the provided drawing: 450 mm.

parameters.name: width_mm
parameters.label: B Overall width (mm)
parameters.description: Total railway U-girder width from outside edge to outside edge. Default follows the provided drawing: 5500 mm.

parameters.name: depth_mm
parameters.label: H Overall depth (mm)
parameters.description: Total section depth from top of side wall to bottom. Default follows the provided drawing: 1600 mm.

parameters.name: top_wall_width_mm
parameters.label: Top wall width (mm)
parameters.description: Top side-wall width on each side. The outside notch is derived from lower side width minus this value.

parameters.name: bottom_side_width_mm
parameters.label: Bottom side width (mm)
parameters.description: Lower side block width on each side. With the 600 mm top wall this derives the 50 mm exterior notch.

parameters.name: haunch_x_mm
parameters.label: Haunch X (mm)
parameters.description: Horizontal projection of the inner haunch from the side wall face toward the bridge centerline.

parameters.name: haunch_y_mm
parameters.label: Haunch Y (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical projection of the inner haunch from the vertical side wall down to the floor top at the side.

parameters.name: h1_step_height_mm
parameters.label: h1 Step from bottom (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical distance from section bottom to the exterior side notch/step. Default follows the drawing: 670 mm.

parameters.name: h2_bottom_opening_mm
parameters.label: h2 Bottom recess (mm)
parameters.description: Vertical recess depth from section bottom to the floor-slab underside. Default follows the drawing: 305 mm.

parameters.name: h3_floor_side_thickness_mm
parameters.label: h3 Side floor thk (mm)
parameters.description: Floor slab thickness at the haunch toe/side. Default follows the drawing: 395 mm.

parameters.name: h4_floor_center_thickness_mm
parameters.label: h4 Center floor thk (mm)
parameters.description: Floor slab thickness at bridge centerline. Default follows the drawing: 450 mm.
